title: Indian-Style Haddock Fry
description: A flavorful and spicy Indian-inspired dish made with haddock, perfect for a quick dinner. Serve with a side of rice or roti for a complete meal.
instructions: 1. Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add the ginger and garlic and sauté for 1 minute.
3. Add the haddock fillets and cook for 3-4 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
4. Remove the haddock from the skillet and set aside.
5. In the same skillet, add the sambhar masala and cook for 1 minute.
6. Stir in the savory yogurt and lime juice, and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
7. Add the fluffy basmati rice to the skillet and stir to combine with the yogurt sauce.
8. Serve the haddock on top of the rice, garnished with additional sambhar masala if desired.
